name: step-by-step
description: /step-by-step (alias /sbs) — plan-first sequential runbook with TWO modes (auto · manual default · 0.5.0 2-mode redesign) + 0.6.0 자동 4축 QA after ship (functional·visible·conformance·regression · regression FAIL → auto-revert · 나머지 alert · SKIP=PASS-equivalent · 결과는 plan.md ## qa-results) + 0.7.0 자동 HANDOFF.md 9-section 인계 doc (handoff agent ship+QA 직후 · trigger 키워드 또는 PR≥3/LOC≥500 휴리스틱 · domains/HANDOFF.md 또는 레포 루트 HANDOFF.md · 9 섹션 = PR 매트릭스 · SSOT 파일 인덱스 · 새 API surface · 컴포넌트 트리 · 환경 변수 · 다음 우선순위 · 알려진 한계+guard · memory 인덱스 · 한 줄 시작 가이드 · memory/project_<slug>_handoff.md 자동 미러 · plan 에 handoff verb 있으면 end-user dossier bundle 도 생성 = 사용자가 클릭 한 번에 받아 들고 나갈 실 산출물). MANUAL (the DEFAULT) — chat-form disambiguation (1 question per round, easy-mode 7-element scaffold: icon · canonical name · friendly alias · plain-line · everyday analogy · ASCII sketch · option compare-table · one-line recommendation; closed with → A · B · 또는 자유응답 so free-form answers are explicitly OK) round-by-round until a scan finds ZERO remaining ambiguity, THEN a 🎯 합의된 결정셋 (N개) ASCII tree of every accumulated decision PAUSE — the user types go to confirm or Qn=<other> to flip ONLY that decision (re-render after each flip). On go, write drafts/<slug>-plan.md (gitignored · frontmatter slug/mode/auto-weights/created · task brief · locked decisions · next-action checklist ending with a ship line · completion criteria) and LAUNCH A BACKGROUND AGENT (general-purpose, run_in_background=true) with a self-contained prompt containing the plan.md + ship instructions + completion criteria + auto-QA 4축 + HANDOFF.md 9-section auto-write — the agent runs end-to-end (including ship + auto-QA + HANDOFF.md) with no further user input; user can leave. AUTO — same chat-form scaffold output, but each question is AUTO-PICKED by the 4-axis weighted average instead of waiting for the user: 완성도 (complete · robust + edge-case coverage) + 단순 (simple · Occam razor) + 안전 (safe · blast radius minimized) + 표준 (std · fits the sidecar pattern), default 1:1:1:1, inline override /sbs auto:safety <task> (single-axis force) or /sbs auto:complete=2,simple=3 <task> (explicit weights). AUTO still pauses at the agreement screen — auto-picks get a user pre-commit checkpoint. Mid-run new ambiguity also opens a chat round + re-renders the agreement screen. Mode = FIRST arg token auto[:<axis-or-weights>] | manual (default manual). legacy-manual = the old per-step pause behavior — 1-version deprecation banner, use plain manual going forward. go is NOT a mode (use /go to continue the paused flow). ALL modes halt on a step failure (failing step + verbatim error + un-run tail) and pause before a genuinely irreversible / destructive / outward-facing step (confirm-then-resume, same bar as the bypass self-check). The deliberate single-threaded counterpart to /cycle parallel fan-out — chat-disambiguate → lock → plan.md → background handoff → auto-QA 4축 → HANDOFF.md 9-section.
